jungle.title: Travel to a Jungle biome and locate a Jungle Temple or Call of Yucatan temple structure

ancient_gold.title: Find Ancient Gold Ingots in jungle temple loot (Call of Yucatan drops)

subtitle.text: The Sky Civilization reached toward stars. They buried the Eye when they got there.

description: Kukulkan is the Sky Civilization's guardian.
Call of Yucatan adds the Kukulkan boss in jungle temple structures.
It fights because you found what it was guarding.
It remembers the Sky Civilization reaching too high.
It guards against you doing the same.
Ancient Gold Ingots are in the temple loot.
They are also an ingredient in the Lost Eye chain.
Collect them. The Kukulkan kill yields more.
The Lost Eye was not lost. It was buried.
This is what the Sky Civilization did with things they feared.
→ Locate a Jungle Temple or Call of Yucatan structure [check]
→ Find Ancient Gold Ingots in the loot [check]
